Waypoint.name: Dormitory
Waypoint.Question: I'm heading down to the training field.
Waypoint.Response: "Hey, be careful out there! Don't forget to stay alert and focused. The training field can get pretty intense. Are you sure you've got everything you need for today's session?" I ask, eyeing the gear you're lugging around the room.

Waypoint.name: Training
Waypoint.Question: HOOAH! A tough day, indeed,
Waypoint.Response: "I'll be right behind you then," I say, nodding to indicate my own readiness to head out. "Make sure to check your gear before we move out, and don't hesitate to call if you need anything." My tone is steady, but a hint of concern lingers beneath the surface, a reflection of our current low-coherence environment.

Waypoint.name: Pool
Waypoint.Question: I am sweating like an old pig.
Waypoint.Response: "It's going to be a hot one today," I observe, my own voice steady and calm, "I'd suggest taking some time to hydrate before heading out." My eyes are fixed on you, a gentle concern etched on my face.
